name: Grilled Shrimp with Pasta and Fresh Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 4 large Ripe tomatoes, cut into Chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil for the pasta.
2. Start a charcoal fire or light a gas grill.
3. Brush the shrimp with about 1/4 cup olive oil and sprinkle them with salt and pepper.
4. In a bowl, mix together the remaining olive oil, 2 tbsp balsamic vinegar, shallot, Dijon mustard, and season with salt and pepper. Taste and add more vinegar if needed.
5. Place the tomatoes in a large bowl to marinate with the vinaigrette and basil.
6. Grill the shrimp over high heat until they turn pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
7. Cook the pasta according to package directions.
8. Drain the pasta, toss with the tomatoes, top with the grilled shrimp, and serve. Crawfish works great with this dish as well.
